name: Giblet Gravy (for Poultry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the liver, gizzard, and heart thoroughly and cover them with water. Cook until tender. Drain off the water.
2. Save about 4 tablespoons of the cooking fat in the pan.
3. Chop the giblets fine.
4. Add the remaining cooking fat to a skillet over medium heat.
5. Add 3 tablespoons of flour and blend well into the fat.
6. Gradually add the chopped giblet water, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
7. Stir in the cooked giblets for a few minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot.
